name: Peach Business Software
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Peach Business Software"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://peachv12.com.au/inventory-control-software-neto/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-on Website!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://peachv12.com.au/peach-software-inventory-control-support-portal/", "children": [{"text": "contact Peach Business Software"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Peach Business Software is a complete ERP package for warehouse, inventory and customer management, order fulfilment, and point of sale. It has a wide range of customisation available which allows for complex workflows and product configurations. Peach Business Software has functions including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Warehouse management: Paperless stocktaking and stock adjustments using the online interface."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inventory management: Paperless purchases and accounts receivable management."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Customer management: Manage both customers and suppliers and keep track of interactions with them."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add-on Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "add-on-benefits-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the "}, {"text": "Peach Business Software", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Export sales orders from Neto into Peach for fulfilment. Once orders are dispatched in Peach they are uploaded to Neto with all of the tracking information."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Import all products in Peach into Neto and keep them up to date. Customisable mapping is available between Peach and Neto product fields."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Export customers from Neto into Peach on sales orders."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Peach Business Software Add-on"}], "data-id": "set-up-the-peach-business-software-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Peach Business Software add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the Peach Business Software add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Get App", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window and you\u2019ll be directed to the Peach website to complete the process."}]}]}]}]
